heading: Termination
label: 11319 Termination
text: The Council shall cease to exist, and the requirements of this subchapter shall terminate, onOctober 1, 20281So in original. Probably should be followed by a period.1

Effective Date of 1990 AmendmentAmendment by deemed to have taken effect as if enacted , see , set out as an Effective Date of Temporary Extension of Emergency Low Income Housing Preservation Act of 1987 and Correction of Any Repeal note under section 1715 of Title 12, Banks and Banking.Pub. Temporary Extension of Provisions, as added by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–289, div. B, title II, § 21042Pub. L. 110–5, § 2121 Stat. 53Feb. 15, 2007“The provisions of title II of the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act ( et seq.) shall continue in effect, notwithstanding section 209 of such Act [this section], through the earlier of: (1) the date specified in section 106 of this division []; or (2) the date of the enactment into law of an authorization Act relating to the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act.”42 U.S.C. 11311Sept. 30, 2007

Temporary Extension of Council, , , as amended by , , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–494, § 3104 Stat. 1185Pub. L. 106–400, § 2114 Stat. 1675Oct. 31, 1990Oct. 30, 2000“(a).—ExtensionIf upon enactment of this Act [], section 209 of the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act () provides for the termination of the Interagency Council on the Homeless on , then notwithstanding such section, the Interagency Council on the Homeless shall cease to exist, and the requirements of title II of the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act [ et seq.] shall terminate, on .Oct. 31, 1990October 31, 1990November 30, 199042 U.S.C. 1131942 U.S.C. 11311“(b).—LimitationsIf upon enactment of this Act [] such section 209 provides for termination of the Council (referred to in subsection (a)) on a date other than , this section shall not apply. This section shall not apply with respect to any amendment to section 209 of the McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act made after the date of the enactment of this Act.”Oct. 31, 1990October 31, 1990
